debug_info.goal:
case inr.refine_2
G : Type u
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup G
inst✝² : Fintype G
ε : ℝ
q : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Module (ZMod q) G
A₁ A₂ S : Finset G
α : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
hq₃ : 3 ≤ q
hq : Nat.Prime q
hα₀ : 0 < α
hα₂ : α ≤ 2⁻¹
hε₀ : 0 < ε
hε₁ : ε ≤ 1
hαA₁ : α ≤ ↑A₁.dens
hαA₂ : α ≤ ↑A₂.dens
x✝ : MeasurableSpace G := ⊤
this✝⁴ : Fact (1 < q)
this✝³ : DiscreteMeasurableSpace G
hA₁✝ : A₁.Nonempty
hA₂ : A₂.Nonempty
hα₁ : α ≤ 1
this✝² : 0 ≤ log α⁻¹
this✝¹ : 0 ≤ log (ε * α)⁻¹
hS : S.Nonempty
hA₁ : ↑(A₁.addConst univ) ≤ α⁻¹
k : ℕ := ⌈1 + log (ε * α / 4)⁻¹⌉₊
hk₀ : 0 < k
T : Finset G
hTcard : α⁻¹ ^ (-4096 * ↑⌈1 + log (min 1 (↑A₂.card / ↑S.card))⁻¹⌉ * ↑k ^ 2 / ε ^ 2) * ↑univ.card ≤ ↑T.card
hTε : ↑‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε
hT : T.Nonempty
Δ : Finset (AddChar G ℂ) := largeSpec (mu T) 2⁻¹
V : Submodule (ZMod q) G := (AddSubgroup.toZModSubmodule q) (⨅ γ ∈ Δ, γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker)
V' : Finset G := (↑V).toFinset
this✝ : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu V' ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = V'.expect fun x => (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x
this : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0
⊢ |∑ x ∈ S, (mu (↑V).toFinset ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x| ≤ ε

failed_attempts:
calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S‖₊ := by
        apply abs_sub_le_of_nonneg_of_le_norm
        exact fun _ ↦ by positivity
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_supr_norm, Finset.sup_le_iff] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0‖_[∞] := by
        exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (by apply norm_expect_sub_const_le_norm)
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_supr_norm, Finset.sup_le_iff] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_abs, Finset.expect_def, V'] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0‖_[∞] := by
        apply ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal
        exact norm_sub_le_of_mem_V_sub_const (by infer_instance) _
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_supr_norm, Function.const_apply] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this, this✝]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [dconv_assoc, dconv_comm, dconv_left_invariant] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have hTε' : ‖(μ T)^[k] * (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) - μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂‖ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using hTε
        have hV : ∀ x ∈ V, (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) x = (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) 0 := by
          intro x hx
          -- Use that V is contained in the kernel of all large Fourier coefficients,
          -- so the function is constant on cosets of V.
          sorry
        -- Since V' = V.toFinset and V is a submodule, averaging over V' gives the value at 0.
        have : V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) = (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0 := by
          apply Finset.mean_const
          intro x hx
          exact hV x (Finset.mem_toFinset.mp hx)
        simp_all

rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    constructor <;> apply le_of_sub_nonneg <;>
      simp_all only [sub_nonneg] <;>
        nlinarith [hTε, hTcard]

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0‖_[∞] := by
        apply ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal
        exact norm_expect_sub_const_le_norm (by positivity)
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_supr_norm, Finset.sup_le_iff] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] := by
        apply almost_periodicity_estimate
        assumption
      _ ≤ ε := hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simp_all [norm_eq_abs, Complex.norm_eq_abs, Finset.expect_def]
        <;> linarith

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] := by
        apply AlmostPeriodicity.almost_periodic_approx
        assumption
      _ ≤ ε := hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ T ∗^ k ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖_[⊤] := by

        assumption

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [norm_eq_abs, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] using this

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have h : ‖μ T ∗^ k ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε := by exact_mod_cast hTε
        have h' : ∀ x ∈ V, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x = (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0 := by
          intro x hx
          have : x ∈ ⨅ γ ∈ Δ, γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker := by simpa [V] using hx
          simp_all [Set.mem_iInf, AddChar.toAddMonoidHom_apply]
          sorry
        simp_all [Finset.expect_const, abs_of_nonneg, hε₀.le]

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0‖_[∞] := by
          exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal <| norm_expect_sub_const_le _ _
      _ ≤ ε := by
          have := hTε
          simpa [norm_eq_supr_norm, Finset.sup_le_iff] using this

rw [this✝, this]
    exact hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] := by
        apply AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_almost_periodicity_bound
        assumption
      _ ≤ ε := hTε

rw [this, this✝]
    exact hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have hTε' : ‖(μ T) ^ k * (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) - μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂‖ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using hTε
        exact AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_almost_periodicity_boosted_aux ε hε₀ hε₁ k
          (by positivity) (le_inv_of_le_inv₀ (by positivity) hα₂) hA₁ univ_nonempty S A₂ hS hA₂
          T hT hTcard hTε' V V'

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this, this✝]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have : ‖μ T ∗^ k ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖ ≤ ε := hTε
        have : V ≤ AddSubgroup.closure (Set.range fun _ : Fin k ↦ T) := sorry
        exact unbalancing_estimate this hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have hTε' : ‖(μ T) ^ k * (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) - μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂‖ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using hTε
        have hV : ∀ x ∈ V, (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) x = (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) 0 := by
          sorry
        simpa [hV] using hTε'

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have := hTε
        simpa [V', Finset.expect_def, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm] using
          abs_sub_le_iff.2 ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have hV' : V' = Set.toFinset V := rfl
        rw [hV']
        exact AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_almost_periodicity_bound ε hε₀ hε₁ k
          (by positivity) (le_inv_of_le_inv₀ (by positivity) hα₂) hA₁ univ_nonempty S A₂ hS hA₂
          T hT hTcard hTε Δ V

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        refine' le_trans (abs_sub_le_of_almost_constant_on_subgroup _ _) hTε
        exact fun x hx => by simpa [hx] using Submodule.zero_mem V

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]

        apply AlmostPeriodicity.approx_by_periodic
        assumption
      _ ≤ ε := hTε

rw [this✝, this]
    exact hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ‖mu V' ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] := by
        apply dist_le_of_forall_mem_ball
        intro x hx
        simp_all [Finset.mem_univ, Function.const]
      _ ≤ ε := hTε

rw [this, this✝]
    exact hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have : ‖(μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)‖₊ ≤ 1 := by
          calc
            _ ≤ ‖μ A₁‖₊ * ‖μ A₂‖₊ * ‖𝟭 S‖₊ := by
              gcongr
              all_goals positivity
            _ ≤ 1 * 1 * 1 := by
              gcongr
              all_goals
                apply norm_mu_le_one
        exact hTε.trans (by simpa using this)

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
        = |V'.expect (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by rw [this✝, this]
      _ ≤ ε := by
        have hTε' : ‖(μ T)^[k] * (μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂) - μ A₁ * 𝟭 S * μ A₂‖ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using hTε
        exact AlmostPeriodicity.approx_by_subgroup hTε' V' Δ (by rfl)
